name: designlang
description: Extract any website's design language and ship it. Eight slash commands — /extract, /grade, /battle, /remix, /pack, /theme-swap, /brand, /pair — wrap the designlang CLI to pull DTCG tokens, Tailwind/shadcn/Figma vars, motion + voice, generate shareable graded report cards, head-to-head battle pages, six-vocabulary remixes, downloadable design-system bundles, OKLCH-correct theme recolouring, full editorial brand-guidelines books, and design crossovers between two sites.
